[[Baron/Legends|Baron]] '''Balcomb''' was a [[Tapani Noble Houses|noble]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. An artist from the [[Freeworlds Territory]] once tried convincing Balcomb to commission a bust, comparing Balcomb's brow and fine facial lines with those of [[Shey Tapani]].

{{Char-stub}}
